response.justification: Candidate lacks the mandatory profile for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the 5-10 years required, and there is no Windows-platform focus. No SQL Server or Oracle experience is listed, and there is no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure. Strengths lie in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work, which do not align with this engagement.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Broad polyglot experience across backend, frontend, and embedded systems
Excellent communication signals via workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience, none recent and not on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain background
